mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_progress WHERE DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) = CURDATE() OR DATE(completed_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_submissions WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT report_id, target_type, target_id, reason_code, status, created_at FROM reports ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT notice_id, title, status, created_at FROM notices ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT label, value, 0 AS percent FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)), '%m/%d') AS label, DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM learning_progress WHERE DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) ) daily ORDER BY activity_date

SELECT s.subject_name AS label, COUNT(lp.progress_id) AS value, 0 AS percent FROM subjects s LEFT JOIN learning_progress lp ON s.subject_id = lp.subject_id AND ( lp.lesson_completed = 1 OR lp.practice_passed = 1 OR lp.completed_at IS NOT NULL ) WHERE s.is_active = 1 GROUP BY s.subject_id, s.subject_name, s.sort_order ORDER BY value DESC, s.sort_order ASC LIMIT 7
